references.hebrew: יוֹר֤וּ מִשְׁפָּטֶ֙יךָ֙ לְיַֽעֲקֹ֔ב וְתוֹרָתְךָ֖ לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יָשִׂ֤ימוּ קְטוֹרָה֙ בְּאַפֶּ֔ךָ וְכָלִ֖יל עַֽל־מִזְבְּחֶֽךָ׃
references.english:
They shall teach Your laws to Jacob
And Your instructions to Israel.
They shall offer You incense to savorgThey shall offer You incense to savor Lit. “They shall place incense in Your nostril.”
And whole-offerings on Your altar.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְעָרְכ֗וּ בְּנֵ֤י אַהֲרֹן֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים אֵ֚ת הַנְּתָחִ֔ים אֶת־הָרֹ֖אשׁ וְאֶת־הַפָּ֑דֶר עַל־הָעֵצִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הָאֵ֔שׁ אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
commentary_links.english: and Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall lay out the sections, with the head and the suet, on the wood that is on the fire upon the altar.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star למאי אתא לכדתניא כיצד היה עושה נותן

commentary_links.hebrew: בְּרׇב־עָ֥ם הַדְרַת־מֶ֑לֶךְ וּבְאֶ֥פֶס לְ֝אֹ֗ם מְחִתַּ֥ת רָזֽוֹן׃
commentary_links.english:
A numerous people is the glory of a king;
Without a nation a ruler is ruined.

commentary_links.hebrew: יוֹר֤וּ מִשְׁפָּטֶ֙יךָ֙ לְיַֽעֲקֹ֔ב וְתוֹרָתְךָ֖ לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יָשִׂ֤ימוּ קְטוֹרָה֙ בְּאַפֶּ֔ךָ וְכָלִ֖יל עַֽל־מִזְבְּחֶֽךָ׃
commentary_links.english:
They shall teach Your laws to Jacob
And Your instructions to Israel.
They shall offer You incense to savorgThey shall offer You incense to savor Lit. “They shall place incense in Your nostril.”
And whole-offerings on Your altar.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יורו משפטיך ליעקב יששכר דכתיב ובני

commentary_links.hebrew: בָּרֵ֤ךְ יְהֹוָה֙ חֵיל֔וֹ וּפֹ֥עַל יָדָ֖יו תִּרְצֶ֑ה מְחַ֨ץ מׇתְנַ֧יִם קָמָ֛יו וּמְשַׂנְאָ֖יו מִן־יְקוּמֽוּן׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english:
Bless, O ETERNAL One, his substance,
And favor his undertakings.
Smite the loins of his foes;
Let his enemies rise no more.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: קטורה באפך וכתיב בתריה ברך ה חילו

commentary_links.hebrew: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י יִשָּׂשכָ֗ר יוֹדְעֵ֤י בִינָה֙ לַֽעִתִּ֔ים לָדַ֖עַת מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רָאשֵׁיהֶ֣ם מָאתַ֔יִם וְכׇל־אֲחֵיהֶ֖ם עַל־פִּיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: of the Issacharites, men who knew how to interpret the signs of the times, to determine how Israel should act; their chiefs were 200, and all their kindred followed them;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יששכר יודעי בינה לעתים לדעת מה יעשה

commentary_links.hebrew: לִ֤י גִלְעָ֨ד ׀ וְלִ֬י מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה וְ֭אֶפְרַיִם מָע֣וֹז רֹאשִׁ֑י יְ֝הוּדָ֗ה מְחֹֽקְקִֽי׃
commentary_links.english:
Gilead and Manasseh would be mine,
Ephraim my chief stronghold,
Judah my scepter;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ליה הא שכיחא והא לא שכיחא &star אמר רבא
